---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new node, UI improvement, or platform capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one-paragraph description of what you want and why.

## Use case

Describe the problem this feature solves. Who benefits and how often?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Include mockups, API sketches, or pseudocode if helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought of and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art, or external integrations.
